notes: Manifest backfilled 2026-07-09 for a pre-existing open PR (#1173) that had no lane manifest, blocking ops:orchestration-reconcile. This is a housekeeping/tracking-correction lane per the Linear issue description (PR content already implemented; issue exists solely to bind correct manifest/tracking), not new work. preflight_token points to a documented backfill record, not a passing token: preflight was run twice against the verified true GitHub branch tip and returned NOT_APPLICABLE both times, with non-waivable-at-T2 failures PG5 (branch is 32 commits behind main), PL3 (Linear state 'In Claude' is not in preflight's hardcoded startable-state allowlist), PX1 (pre-existing root .ops/sync.yml references an unrelated older issue, UTV2-1072), and PX2 (commit history references the branch's original pre-rename issue ID UTV2-1482, expected per the issue text). None of these are fixable without rebasing or rewriting the PR branch, which was explicitly out of scope for this reconciliation.

override.reason: PM-authorized manifest backfill for a historical/pre-existing PR where a fresh preflight PASS is structurally unobtainable without touching the PR branch (stale-branch PG5, old-ID PX2/commit-history references, hardcoded-allowlist PL3 mismatch, legacy PX1 sync-file drift). See notes field and .out/ops/preflight/claude/utv2-1512-command-center-workbench.json for full detail.

parked.reason: Parked during OS v1 stabilization. Product work remains paused until OS v1 Lock. This is not a product verdict.
parked.mechanism: Manifest relocated from docs/06_status/lanes/ to docs/06_status/lanes/parked/ (no schema-supported 'abandoned'/'parked' status value exists as of this writing) so it drops out of readAllManifestPaths()'s non-recursive scan and no longer counts toward the Claude executor slot cap. Lifecycle status field left as-is (in_review) since it is not actually done or merged. The associated open PR and branch remain untouched for later product reuse. No lease existed to release. Landed via a governed PR after an initial direct-main push of this same change was reverted for policy compliance.

superseded.reason: OS v1 Lock ratified (UTV2-1530). This foundation branch's scope is fully superseded by the merged UTV2-1522 Command Center v2 redesign (PR #1190, b0a9002b, 2026-07-13). PR #1173 closed (not merged) and branch claude/utv2-1512-command-center-workbench deleted. No further action expected on this issue.
